description: Test which description specificity produces most reliable dispatch

variants.description: Read file contents via a staged viewport with conflict detection. Supports line_start/line_end for partial reads.
variants.hypothesis: Constraint statements -- recommended by Anthropic, expected best

variants.description: Read a file's contents via a scoped viewport. This tool can be used to open and view any text file and can optionally specify a line range to read only a portion of the file. It maintains a staged buffer for safety.
